agent.name: James Okonkwo
agent.notable_actions: Asked targeted follow-ups, captured competitor pricing intel (Headspace $12.99), surfaced bundle willingness-to-pay signal ($35-40).

resolution.summary: Feedback captured across yin/restorative yoga content, meditation programmes, and granular class search.

key_moments.description: Customer states willingness to pay more for combined meditation + fitness
key_moments.trigger: Mention that meditation programmes are in development

pain_points.description: Yin yoga catalogue is too small and sessions are too short
pain_points.verbatim_quote: you have almost no yin yoga content. like there are maybe 3 yin classes total.

pain_points.description: No restorative yoga or yoga nidra content
pain_points.verbatim_quote: theres a whole world of slower practice thats just missing from the platform

pain_points.description: Search/tag filters too broad to find specific class attributes
pain_points.verbatim_quote: theres no way to filter that specifically. the tags are too broad

motivations.description: Wants one app instead of paying separately for fitness + meditation

competitor_mentions.name: Headspace
competitor_mentions.detail: Paying $12.99/mo for meditation alongside StreamFit; would cancel Headspace if StreamFit added structured meditation programmes.

feature_requests.feature: Restorative yoga and yoga nidra content
Granular class search (body focus, duration, difficulty, style)

intent.primary: Share positive feedback and request content/UX improvements
intent.secondary: Signal willingness to pay more for bundled meditation

factors: Active 5x/week user, very happy with core yoga product

upsell_opportunity.target_plan: Premium+ / wellness bundle including structured meditation
signals: Explicit statement: would pay $35-40 for combined service

action_items.action: Log yin/restorative yoga + yoga nidra as content request
Log granular search filters as UX request
Tag account for meditation programme beta when launched
